import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torchvision.models as models

class CIFAR100ResNet(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_classes=100, pretrained=False):
        super().__init__()
        self.register_buffer('mean', torch.tensor([0.5071, 0.4867, 0.4408]).view(1, 3, 1, 1))
        self.register_buffer('std', torch.tensor([0.2675, 0.2565, 0.2761]).view(1, 3, 1, 1))
        self.model = models.resnet18(pretrained=pretrained)
        self.model.conv1 = nn.Conv2d(3, 64, kernel_size=3, stride=1, padding=1, bias=False)
        self.model.maxpool = nn.Identity()
        self.model.fc = nn.Linear(self.model.fc.in_features, num_classes)

    def forward(self, x):
        if x.dtype == torch.uint8:
            x = x.float() / 255.0
        x = (x - self.mean) / self.std
        return self.model(x)
